editFormFields.name: emailAddress
editFormFields.hint: This is the default way we will contact you. Note: supplying your email implies your consent for us to contact you by email.

editFormFields.name: cPhoneNumber
editFormFields.hint: An alternative or supplemental means of contact. Please include the international dialling code if it is not a UK number. Supplying a number implies your consent for us to contact you using it.

editFormFields.name: cMatrixID
editFormFields.hint: We use a Matrix group to keep in touch and to stay up to date on availability and capacity. You can sign up at app.element.io if you do not already have a Matrix ID. On Element, find your ID in the top-left corner by clicking your profile picture. It looks like: @username:domain.com. Please include the @ sign.

editFormFields.name: cOpenCollectiveID
editFormFields.hint: If you signed up as a Member via our Open Collective, please indicate your Open Collective ID here.

editFormFields.name: cWebsite
editFormFields.hint: If you have one… This information may be shared with other members as part of your profile.

editFormFields.name: cCvUrl
editFormFields.hint: A link to your CV if it is published somewhere online. If it is a document, please upload it using the field below.

editFormFields.name: cAvailability
editFormFields.hint: Do you have any capacity for more work at the moment?

editFormFields.name: cWorkCapacity
editFormFields.hint: Do you want to hear about work opportunities?

editFormFields.name: cMembershipAspirations
editFormFields.hint: Indicate whether you would like to be listed on our member directory only, or whether you would like to become a member who participates in decisions and consultations when we start recruiting. Membership may involve a subscription fee to help fund administration, but the details are still to be decided.

editFormFields.name: cCountry
editFormFields.hint: We are UK-based, so that is the default. However, if you are outside the UK, please tell us where.

editFormFields.name: cRegion
editFormFields.hint: Your local city or town. This helps us know what people, organisations and/or groups are nearest to you.

editFormFields.name: cAbout
editFormFields.hint: Please introduce yourself briefly. No need to describe your wants or offers — those come next.

editFormFields.name: cProvenance
editFormFields.hint: Let us know how you found out about Sepheo.

editFormFields.name: cConnections
editFormFields.hint: Are you part of the co-op movement already? Are you looking to be? Or perhaps you do not know or do not care? Either way, we are interested in what connections to companies or co-ops you might be able to provide.

editFormFields.name: cNeeds
editFormFields.hint: For example: what kind of roles are you looking for? Do you have any particular rates? Who would you like to meet? And what do you think the network should provide?

editFormFields.name: cOffers
editFormFields.hint: For example: what roles or skills can you offer, either as a freelancer/professional or for other members? Is there anything you would like to offer the network more generally?
